mnemonics: Full Adder is Half Adder + Carry
keyPoints: Half Adder: Two inputs A and B with sum (S) and carry (C).
Full Adder: Three inputs A, B, and Cin with sum (S), carry out (CO), and carry (C).
Verilog implementation of Half Adder: 4 gates (AND, OR, NOT, XOR).
Verilog implementation of Full Adder: 5 gates (AND, OR, NOT, XOR, XNOR).
Redundant bits: For half adder, no redundant bits. For full adder, Cin is redundant.
Verilog code can be used for any binary adder-subtractor configuration
